title: CTD Screenie
description: Automatically screenshot your play-through on a configurable interval
body:
The idea sprung from the weird nostalgia of not really having screenshots while I play Minecraft, not having something to look back unto as the world completes... :T


When installed, it will automatically take a screenshot at a set interval, by default: 5 minutes. You can change this with the config file, or options in-game with Neoforge.


We recommend that when you change this interval, you keep sane numbers in mind. Example: 4K on an older hard drive with an interval of 2 seconds is not recommended...
